text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I did it, Trainer! I won!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yeah, my mind just went blank! The only
thing I was aware of was my body going in
overdrive.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And by the time I realized that, I'd already
crossed the finish line—in first place!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, I really did it! I got first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, I really did it! I got first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Running wild like that might be the only thing I'm
good at...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if it means I can take first place again, I'm
happy about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I won this time, but you never know what might
happen next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to be ready—both in spirit and in
muscle!
